evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个 loops，让 agent 每轮改一个超参数、训练 10 分钟、看验证指标，变好就保留，变差就回退。
evals.expected_output: Creates a loop spec with state, action allowlist, validator, keep/revert rules, budget, stop conditions, and audit journal.

evals.prompt: 这个自动化任务不能无限重试，帮我加状态机、失败重试、停止条件和审计日志规则。
evals.expected_output: Defines observe-plan-act-validate-decide-record loop, retry limits, escalation rules, and audit log requirements.
